content.en:
Regarding this cold jade coffin, Ye Tian has indeed forgotten it for a long time, but it doesn't mean that he doesn't remember.

At the beginning, it was this cold jade coffin that withstood the fatal blow of a true ancestor, which saved his life.

As for the origin of the cold jade coffin, he still hasn't figured it out.

It was obviously a palace of a top True Ancestor, why did such a cold jade coffin appear, its defensive effect was too amazing.

When he had just been promoted to True Ancestor, he also tried to open the cold jade coffin, but failed.

So, he didn't care about this cold jade coffin.

Now, this cold jade coffin is trembling.

But Ye Tian took a closer look, and the woman inside didn't seem to move.

Since his divine sense could not detect the inside of the cold jade coffin, Ye Tian could not confirm whether the woman inside was dead or alive, but the vibration of the cold jade coffin was definitely abnormal.

"I am now the strongest true ancestor, I don't know if I can open the cold jade coffin!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He condensed the power of the dark forbidden to form a spear, and struck the cold jade coffin with a single blow.

However, Ye Tian was directly shocked and flew out, but the cold jade coffin was intact, as if there was a mysterious force protecting the cold jade coffin.

"Even the spear formed by the power of the dark forbidden didn't hurt the cold jade coffin, this defense is even more terrifying than I imagined!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

What is the material of this cold jade coffin, why is it so special, and the identity of the woman in the cold jade coffin is definitely not simple.

At this time, the cold jade coffin was still shaking, but Ye Tian couldn't see the root cause.

"It's better to ask General Blood, he has seen a lot, maybe he knows the cold jade coffin!"

So, Ye Tian sent a message to General Blood, carefully explained the material of the cold jade coffin, and even passed on an image of the past, but only said the material, not the cold jade coffin and the woman in the coffin.

Soon after, General Bloody sent a message about the material of the cold jade coffin.

"Biqing Immortal Crystal!"

Judging from the information of the Bloody General, this is a very rare and precious material, which can freeze all injuries and even nourish the soul.

Some of the gods whose souls have been severely injured and are about to be shattered and fallen, once sealed in the Biqing Immortal Crystal, can also recover after a long time, which can be called one of the three life-saving wonders in the domain realm.

Moreover, the Biqing Immortal Crystal has the three characteristics of being indestructible, undetectable, and unrefinable, and it is rumored that only the Domain Ancestor can refine the Biqing Immortal Crystal into a weapon.

"My God, if this cold jade coffin is really the Biqing Immortal Crystal, then the identity of the woman in the coffin is not simple! This is definitely a domain ancestor who refined the Biqing Immortal Crystal into a cold jade coffin, and then sealed this mysterious woman in the cold jade coffin, thus saving one of her lives. In this way, this woman should not be dead!"

Ye Tian guessed.

A woman who has a relationship with Yu Zu and has not fallen, this is simply a hot potato!

Although it was very likely that the domain ancestor was in the Divine Heaven Realm and could not come to the Dao Mountain Realm, if the force established by the other party was one of the upper three heaven forces in the domain realm, then he would take this cold jade coffin for his own use, and maybe he would violate the other party's taboo.

Of course, maybe Ye Tian guessed wrong, maybe this cold jade coffin was a big opportunity!

As time passed, the frequency of the cold jade coffin trembling became higher and higher.

It seems that something is wrong, Ye Tian does not dare to stay in the human race, in case something happens and it affects the human race, then he will regret his death.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian came to a barren area of the Void Heaven True Country, there were no living creatures in the nearby territory, even if something happened, it would not affect others.

What's more, once there is any vision, it is difficult for people to find it, unless it is a vision that spreads throughout the Void Heaven and True Kingdom, then it cannot be hidden.

Click!!!

The sound of friction came, and it seemed that the lid of the cold jade coffin was moving, resulting in the sound of friction.

Seeing this scene, Ye Tian directly threw the cold jade coffin into the void, and ran to the side to watch.

At the same time, he was secretly preparing the Thousand Dao Technique-Tiangang Extreme Speed.

In the event of an accident, he would not hesitate to turn on Tiangang and leave here as fast as possible.

I saw that the lid of the Hanyu coffin moved slowly, and it took about ten minutes to finally open completely.

Then, a Miaoman figure walked out.

Seeing that this woman really came out alive, Ye Tian was very nervous, but he still didn't run away immediately, but used the copying talent to probe the other party's talent.

Name: Ouyang Jiu'er

Cultivation talent: Super god level

Source Force Talent: Super God Level

Source Talent: Super God Level

Source Speed Talent: Super God Level

Source Ice Talent: Super God Level

......

Dao-level natal talent: The Nine Realms of Ice

Seeing the talent of this person named Ouyang Jiu'er, Ye Tian was very surprised, and the other party also had a Dao-level natal talent.

Without saying a word, Ye Tian directly copied the other party's Dao-level natal talent.

Although he also has a talent similar to the Nine Realms of Ice, the more Dao-level natal talents that contain the ice system, the easier it will be to cultivate Dao techniques involving the rules of the ice system in the future.

Dao-level natal talent is such a thing, naturally the more the merrier, and he will not dislike it.

This Ouyang Jiu'er only has a True Monarch level of cultivation, and he has just been promoted, so he doesn't look like a threat.

"Where is this?"

Ouyang Jiu'er had just woken up, seemed to be a little confused, and muttered to himself.

But soon, he saw Ye Tian and looked at it with a staggered look.

Obviously he was just a true monarch, but this glance brought huge pressure to Ye Tian.

Ye Tian immediately thought that this Ouyang Jiu'er was not simple, not only because of the invisible pressure in his eyes, but more importantly, there was an introduction to the talent situation of copying talent exploration.

Introduction: Ouyang Jiu'er, the reincarnation of the half-step domain ancestor, the true monarch cultivator

"Paralysis, it turned out to be the reincarnation of the Half-Step Domain Ancestor, I guessed wrong before! This cold jade coffin is probably her own. Moreover, it wasn't someone else who sealed her in the cold jade coffin at all, I'm afraid she went in by herself. "

Ye Tian could even guess why Ouyang Jiu'er wanted to enter the cold jade coffin by himself, I was afraid that it had something to do with the Dark Forbidden Domain.

At the beginning, in the battle when the domain realm was shattered, Ouyang Jiu'er was a true monarch cultivator, and his strength had not recovered to the level of a half-step domain ancestor at all, so he was not qualified to participate in that battle at all.

As a result, she was unlucky enough to be thrown into the Dark Forbidden Realm by the Lord of the Realm with a third of the Realm.

One can imagine how small the chances of a true monarch trying to survive the dark forbidden realm are.

So, Ouyang Jiu'er had no choice but to choose a top True Ancestor's palace, took out a cold jade coffin in his collection, and then walked in by himself, falling into a deep sleep.

In this way, the cold jade coffin resisted the strange power of the Dark Forbidden Domain and arrived at the Daoshan Realm safely.

I'm afraid that this Ouyang Jiu'er also set up some kind of mechanism at the beginning, such as how many years after entering another realm, it will be slowly unsealed, and so on.

In short, Ouyang Jiu'er came out of the cold jade coffin.

"Did you get this Biqing Immortal Coffin?"

Ouyang Jiu'er looked at Ye Tian and asked.

"That's right!" Ye Tian nodded, "Who are you, lying in this coffin?"

Ouyang Jiu'er's eyes rolled and said, "I was seriously injured at the beginning, and my father sent it into this Biqing immortal coffin for healing, and now I just came out, I don't know where this is, can you tell me one or two?"

Feign!

Ye Tian thought so in his heart, but he didn't say it, this kind of reincarnation of a half-step domain ancestor, who knows what abilities and hole cards he has, naturally he can't be easily offended.

After all, the half-step Domain Ancestor is an existence that is even more powerful than the Invincible True Ancestor, and it is extremely close to the Domain Ancestor, even stronger than the Green Yin Dao Ancestor.

The Green Yin Dao Ancestor only got a glimpse of the mysteries of the Domain Ancestor, and had not really stepped into the ranks of the Half-Step Domain Ancestor, and the Half-Step Domain Ancestor did not know how many Silk Domain Ancestor mysteries he had comprehended, and he was only one step away from stepping into the Domain Ancestor.

This kind of existence is undoubtedly the strongest existence that Ye Tian has known so far!

"This is the Xuanxu Ancient Realm!"

Ye Tian said truthfully.

Immediately, he told the origin of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm one by one, and also told his experience of getting a cold jade coffin from an underground palace.

"Thank you! If you hadn't brought me out, I'm afraid it would have taken me a long time to wake up!" Ouyang Jiu'er thanked.

But immediately, she said again: "I'll call you big brother, I have no place to go now, this is a strange realm, and my strength is too weak, I have just been promoted to the true monarch not long ago, why don't you take me in!"

"No!"

Ye Tian wanted to say this word, but he didn't say it.

He guessed that Ouyang Jiu'er probably wanted to understand the situation of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm by his side first, and then plan carefully.

But he really didn't want to take Ouyang Jiu'er in, who knew if this Ouyang Jiu'er was a demon, what if it was not good for him?

"Forget it, let's take one step at a time, maybe it's a good thing, a little bit of cultivation secrets from the mouth of such an existence, that's a big opportunity!"

Ye Tian comforted himself like this.

Immediately, Ye Tian responded to Ouyang Jiu'er.

"Okay, then let's live in the Terrans first!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.
